resources.string:
Camera not found. Please check:
1) Cable connection
2) Camera power
3) PC / PTP mode on the camera
USB I/O error. Please switch the camera from Mass Storage to PTP / MTP mode.
Response timed out. Try a different USB cable.
USB permission was denied. Reconnect the cable and grant permission again.
This USB device is not supported.
Please restart the app and try again.
Automatically reconnect when the camera Wi-Fi is available again
Notification permission is required to keep auto-reconnect running in the background.
